scripts.fetch: astro build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),html=fs.readFileSync('dist/index.html','utf8'),m=html.match(/hackathonsData = (\[.*?\])\s*;/s);if(m){fs.writeFileSync('src/data/hackathons.json',JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(m[1]),null,2));console.log('Saved '+JSON.parse(m[1]).length+' hackathons to src/data/hackathons.json')}"
